parsed.production_notes: The video features a human actor interacting with a tablet. The lighting, movements, and setting appear natural and consistent with a human-recorded video.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, medium build, fair complexion. She has blonde hair tied in a half-up ponytail and wears large, dark-rimmed glasses.
characters.wardrobe: A light green, textured, long-sleeved sweater.
characters.demeanor: Casual, slightly hesitant but engaged, eating a salad while talking.

characters.appearance: Digital avatar of a young female with long, wavy red hair and fair skin.
characters.wardrobe: A white t-shirt with a red graphic.

scenes.setting: A brightly lit room with a window covered by slatted blinds. A table with a salad bowl and a tablet. A drying rack is visible in the background.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is seated at a wooden table, eating a salad from a clear plastic container using a fork. She is looking down at a tablet resting on the table in front of her. The tablet displays Character B, an AI avatar. The background features a window with white slatted blinds, letting in bright daylight. A light blue drying rack with some items on it is partially visible behind her.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shows a woman eating a salad while interacting with a language learning app on her tablet. The tablet screen shows an AI avatar. Spanish flag banners are overlaid at the top of the screen. Subtitles appear in the center, translating the conversation.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: Can you speak Spanish?
Character A says: Uh, un poco. [A little.]
Character B says: Okay, what Spanish words do you know?
Character A says: Hola? [Hello?]
Character B says: Nice! What else?
Character A says: Gracias. [Thank you.]
Character B says: Good. And what do you say when you make a mistake?
Character A says: I... yo... sorry? [I... I... sorry?]
Character B says: Almost! Repeat after me: "Lo siento."
Character A says: Lo siento. [I'm sorry.]
Character B says: Your level is A1.
Character A says: I don't really speak Spanish... I just watch series with subtitles.
Character B says: That's enough to start! You can practice with AI tutors like me.
Character A says: Like you?
Character B says: Yes! Praktika has AI Spanish tutors who correct you and talk to you naturally. You'll start speaking Spanish much faster.
Character A says: But... with an AI?
Character B says: You won't lose anything by trying, and it will be worth it.
Character A says: Okay... teach me Spanish.
Character B says: I will, but you better not give orders to your new maestra.
Character A says: Lo siento! [I'm sorry!]
Character B says: Go download Praktika right now.
Character A says: Okay, let's go!
